messages.content: What do you see on my screen? Describe it in detail.

The image on your screen is a web page with a dark background, displaying a user interface for J.A.R.V.I.S, an AI assistant. 

At the top, there is a browser tab with "J.A.R.V.I.S" and a URL "localhost:8000/app/". Below that, a greeting reads "Good afternoon. How may I assist you today?" with several buttons: "What can you do?", "Open YouTube", "Fun fact", "Play music", "My schedule today", and "Analyze my screen". A text input field at the bottom invites you to "Ask Jarvis anything…". The time "14:56 25-04-2026" is visible at the bottom right.
